title: [MTR 4] Metro 777
description: This resource pack adds the Class 777 with the Metro Livery from SCR
body:
![Image showing the Metro 777 mode, taken from the frontside of the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e817fe3faa71b0d40a9ef2f05698f1948b6d3ab.png)

**⚠️ ONLY COMPATIBLE WITH MTR 4 ⚠️**

---

This resource pack adds the respective train from Stepford County Railway, to the list available in MTR. It is a reskin of the Merseyrail 777.

The pack includes;
  - Front & Rear Cab 
  - Two different coach types

If there's any issues feel free to let me know 

_This pack is not affiliated with, nor a product of SCR_



**Credit**

Many thanks to **Ultimate-USA-YT** for allowing use of their model.

Original 777 found here: [[MTR4] Class 777](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/class-777)
